aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and ratings to build trust and improve local search presence.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant HVAC keywords to enhance search visibility.
Implement a blog or resource section with HVAC-related content to boost organic traffic and authority.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has Google Business Profile (GBP) potential but lacks a visible GBP listing and customer reviews.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business is not leveraging GBP to its full potential, missing out on local search traffic and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent Name, Address, and Phone (NAP) information on its website, but lacks citations on external directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify GBP listing with accurate NAP information.
List the business on relevant local directories and HVAC service platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for the business.
Missing Service schema for specific HVAC services offered.
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services and expecting detailed business information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing existing schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, keyword-rich content to establish the business as an authority in the HVAC niche.
